use_cases: Landing page hero section with animated entrance effects for SaaS applications
Dark/light theme toggleable hero for product pages and marketing sites
Profile avatar hover tooltips with smooth motion animations
Full-viewport hero with gradient text and icon animations
Theme-persistent hero section with localStorage integration
ai_summary: A versatile hero section component featuring animated text, gradient styling, and theme toggle functionality with light/dark mode support. Includes Framer Motion animations for smooth transitions, avatar components with hover tooltips, and localStorage-based theme persistence. Built as a composite component with a ThemeProvider context for scalable theme management across applications.
